description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits a generally ovate shape with an irregular margin, showing signs of potential mechanical damage or insect feeding. Venation is visible but not prominently displayed."} {"description": "Presence of a distinct, dark brown to black, necrotic lesion. The lesion appears slightly sunken and has a defined, irregular border. A chlorotic halo surrounds the lesion, indicating a localized host response. Smaller, punctate lesions are also visible."} Lesions are localized, not uniformly distributed across the leaf surface. The primary lesion is located mid-leaf, with smaller lesions scattered along the margin. The chlorotic area extends from the primary lesion towards the leaf apex.
